## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] chore / refactor / docs / ci

## Target branch

- [ ] Base is `development` (feature work)
- [ ] Base is `main` (release: `development → main` only)

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch cut from `development`
- [ ] Conventional commit messages
- [ ] `yarn build` (backend) / `pnpm build` (frontend) pass locally
- [ ] No secrets committed; `.env.example` updated if env vars changed
- [ ] CI is green

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should focus on, migration steps, etc. -->
